name: Homepage
description: Static startpage / dashboard — YAML-configured launcher for self-hosted services
author: Crow

env_vars.name: HOMEPAGE_ALLOWED_HOSTS
env_vars.description: Comma-separated host:port list Homepage will accept (e.g., localhost:3030,mybox.local:3030)

env_vars.name: HOMEPAGE_CONFIG_DIR
env_vars.description: Directory holding services.yaml / widgets.yaml / bookmarks.yaml / settings.yaml

notes: Panel-only bundle (no MCP server — Homepage has no public API). Edit YAML files in HOMEPAGE_CONFIG_DIR to configure services, widgets, and bookmarks. Seed config is written on first run if the directory is empty.
